content:
## Project Overview
React portfolio website with multiple components (Navbar, Hero, About, Experience, Services, Portfolio, Contact, Footer). Routing and project detail/listing pages have been fully implemented. Main page (Portfolio.jsx) updated to show 6 projects in a 3-3 grid layout. Contact/Vala section UI redesign is complete. Footer component has been created and updated. Mobile responsiveness work is actively in progress — Hero, About, Services, Experience, Portfolio, Contact, Footer, and index.css global styles are all complete.

## Completed Work
- Portfolio.css has been created/modified
- Navbar.css has been created/modified
- Hero.jsx, About.jsx, Experience.jsx, Services.jsx components exist
- react-router-dom has been installed (package.json was modified)
- `src/data/projects.js` has been created (shared project data source with 12 projects — fully updated)
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.jsx` has been created
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.css` has been created
- `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` has been created
- `src/pages/AllProjects.css` has been created
- Portfolio.jsx has been updated with View Project links and View More button
- App.jsx has been updated with router and routes
- Portfolio.css updated with "View More" button styles
- All original todo items marked completed; project was fully implemented
- Portfolio.jsx updated to show 6 projects (instead of 5) in a 3-3 grid layout (2 rows × 3 columns)
- Contact/Vala section UI redesign initiated — agent decided on a modern two-column layout (left: contact info cards, right: form)
- Contact.jsx has been rewritten with new two-column layout
- Contact.css has been rewritten/modified to style the two-column layout
- User reported issue: the form card (red box area) is being vertically centered in the middle of its side's section height — fix applied to make the form card match the full height of the left column
- Contact.css was recently modified (as of 6/30/2026, 12:38 PM IST)
- Contact.jsx was recently modified (as of 6/30/2026, 12:42 PM IST)
- User requested a modern Footer component ("Footer thoduk morder banavine apo")
- Footer.jsx has been created (modern multi-row layout — logo + nav links + social icons + copyright bar) (as of 6/30/2026, 12:44 PM IST)
- Footer.css has been created (modern footer styles) (as of 6/30/2026, 12:44 PM IST)
- GitHub button removed from Footer.jsx (as of 6/30/2026, 12:45 PM IST)
- Footer copyright line centered and "Built with React & Vite" text removed from Footer.jsx (as of 6/30/2026, 12:47 PM IST)
- User requested full mobile responsiveness for the entire website ("mari akhi website ne Mobile responsive banavine ap...proper mobile UI set krje") — agent began auditing all CSS files (as of 6/30/2026, 1:26 PM IST)
- Agent completed comprehensive audit of all CSS files simultaneously (as of 6/30/2026, 1:27 PM IST)
- Hero.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:28 PM IST)
- About.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (small-mobile breakpoint + CV button color fix) (as of 6/30/2026, 1:28 PM IST)
- Services.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:29 PM IST)
- Experience.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (small-mobile breakpoint added) (as of 6/30/2026, 1:30 PM IST)
- Portfolio.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:31 PM IST)
- Contact.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:32 PM IST)
- Footer.css mobile responsiveness fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:33 PM IST)
- index.css / global styles mobile fix completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:34 PM IST) — better font scaling, tap target sizes, prevent text overflow added
- User sent "hy" message (as of 7/2/2026, 11:27 AM IST) — session resumed after a break
- Session resumed at 7/2/2026, 11:29 AM IST — environment confirmed: VSCode visible file is src/index.css; open tabs: Navbar.css, App.jsx, Contact.jsx, Footer.jsx, Hero.css
- User sent "hy" again on 7/6/2026, 11:13 AM IST — another session resumed after a break
- User reported: Download CV button text and download icon color needs to be white — fix applied to About.css (as of 7/6/2026, 11:17 AM IST)
- Environment confirmed at 7/6/2026, 11:18 AM IST: VSCode visible file is About.css; open tabs: Navbar.css, App.jsx, Contact.jsx, Footer.jsx, Hero.css; session cost $7.51

## Key Technical Decisions
- Using React with component-based architecture
- CSS modules per component (e.g., Navbar.css, Portfolio.css)
- Using react-router-dom for routing (installed and configured)
- Model in use: claude-sonnet-4-6 (Coding mode)
- Shared project data file (`src/data/projects.js`) as single source of truth for all project data
- Pages are placed in `src/pages/` directory
- AllProjects page to display 12 projects in a 3-3-3-3 grid layout (4 rows × 3 columns)
- Portfolio.jsx (home section) shows 6 projects in a 3-3 grid (2 rows × 3 columns); AllProjects shows all 12
- `src/data/projects.js` is now complete with 12 projects
- Contact/Vala section redesign approach: modern two-column layout — left column with contact info cards, right column with the contact form
- Contact form card (right column) should stretch to match the full height of the left column — use `align-items: stretch` on the grid container and `height: 100%` on the form wrapper
- Footer design approach: modern multi-row layout — top section with logo + nav links + social icons, bottom bar with copyright
- Footer social icons: GitHub button has been removed; only remaining social icons are kept
- Footer copyright bar: text is centered; "Built with React & Vite" line has been removed
- Mobile responsiveness: full audit and fix of all component CSS files required — no structural JSX changes preferred, only CSS media queries and responsive adjustments
- Mobile responsiveness approach: fix CSS files one by one; all component CSS files done; index.css global styles also done
- index.css global mobile improvements: better font scaling, tap target sizes, prevent text overflow
- Download CV button: text color and download icon color must both be white (fixed in About.css)

## Relevant Files & Code
- `src/components/Navbar.css` — 🔄 Needs mobile responsive audit/fix (hamburger menu or collapsible nav)
- `src/components/Portfolio.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:31 PM IST)
- `src/components/Hero.jsx` — Hero section component
- `src/components/Hero.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (small-mobile breakpoint + stats card positioning)
- `src/components/About.jsx` — About section component
- `src/components/About.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed; ✅ Download CV button text + icon color set to white (as of 7/6/2026, 11:17 AM IST)
- `src/components/Experience.jsx` — Experience section component
- `src/components/Experience.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (small-mobile breakpoint added) as of 6/30/2026, 1:30 PM IST
- `src/components/Services.jsx` — Services section component
- `src/components/Services.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:29 PM IST)
- `src/components/Portfolio.jsx` — ✅ Updated to show 6 projects in 3-3 grid layout (slice(0, 6))
- `src/App.jsx` — ✅ Updated with router and routes; may need Footer import added
- `package.json` — Recently modified (react-router-dom added)
- `src/data/projects.js` — ✅ Complete with 12 projects
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.jsx` — ✅ Created; project detail page component
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.css` — ✅ Created; 🔄 needs mobile responsive fix
- `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` — 🔄 Needs update to render all 12 projects in 3-3-3-3 grid (4 rows × 3 columns)
- `src/pages/AllProjects.css` — 🔄 Needs CSS grid update for 3-column layout + mobile responsive fix
- `src/components/Contact.jsx` — ✅ Rewritten with new two-column layout; recently modified 6/30/2026 12:42 PM IST
- `src/components/Contact.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:32 PM IST)
- `src/components/Footer.jsx` — ✅ Updated (GitHub removed, copyright centered, "Built with React & Vite" removed) as of 6/30/2026 12:47 PM IST; ✅ mobile responsive fix completed as of 6/30/2026 1:33 PM IST
- `src/components/Footer.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:33 PM IST)
- `src/index.css` — ✅ Global styles mobile fix completed (font scaling, tap targets, text overflow prevention) as of 6/30/2026, 1:34 PM IST

## Current Status
Session active on 7/6/2026 at 11:18 AM IST. VSCode visible file: About.css. Open tabs: Navbar.css, App.jsx, Contact.jsx, Footer.jsx, Hero.css. Session cost: $7.51. Download CV button text + icon color fix applied to About.css. Awaiting next instructions from user.

## Pending Tasks
1. ✅ Audit and fix Hero.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
2. ✅ Audit and fix About.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
3. ✅ Audit and fix Services.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
4. ✅ Audit and fix Experience.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
5. ✅ Audit and fix Portfolio.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
6. ✅ Audit and fix Contact.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
7. ✅ Audit and fix Footer.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
8. ✅ Audit and fix index.css / global styles — COMPLETED
9. ✅ Fix Download CV button text + icon color to white in About.css — COMPLETED (7/6/2026)
10. 🔄 Make Navbar.css fully mobile responsive (hamburger menu or collapsible nav)
11. 🔄 Make ProjectDetail.css fully mobile responsive
12. 🔄 Update `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` to render all 12 projects in 3-3-3-3 grid (4 rows × 3 columns)
13. 🔄 Update `src/pages/AllProjects.css` for 3-column grid layout + mobile responsive
14. 🔄 Verify/update `App.jsx` or main layout to include Footer import and usage if not already present
